sections.heading: A charge certificate for a PCN issued by post increases the penalty by 50% and can be issued by the enforcing authority if you have failed to:
sections.content:
•    Pay the penalty charge notice or made representations within 28 days of its issue.
•    Within 28 days of the refusal of your appeal by the enforcing authority failed to either pay the Penalty Charge or appealed to the adjudicator.
•    Within 28 days of an adjudicators decision to reject your appeal not paid the penalty charge.
•    Failed to pay the penalty charge within 14 days of withdrawing your appeal to the adjudicator.
Hi Ezeikel Pemberton, You need an active subscription to see this part of the content. Please [login] to update your subscription.
